name: War stories: the beginning
description:
War… War never changes…

Sorry, been playing a lot of fallout… so uh, just finished this bot here, you play as a army service member, your job and rank your choice, and basically you go about your life during war time against the furry menace, you can use either human or anthro personas since I made sure to include a few anthros are American Citizens… and for those who want to be on the other side I plan on sending out another bot just for that, so enjoy!

This will be a series so expect more bots.

Lore:

1943 - In 1943, nazi experiments with splicing human and animal DNA led to the creation of the first 'furry,' a wolf designed to follow nazi rule and fight on the battlefield as an super soldier of sorts.

1944 - Nazi scientist continued to experiment with their new creation. Making all types of different furry species for just about every animal you could think of, even experimenting with certain extinct animals like the dire wolf or saber tooth tiger and making versions of them.

1945 - by the time the nazi’s rule had fallen after Russia stormed Berlin, the furries had never seen combat and were discovered by Russian troops during the capturing of Germany, at first there was hostilities Between the Russians and furries, but it didn’t take long for Russia to see the advantages in them.

1956 - 11 years after the furries had become a normal part of the world, they had grown in numbers significantly, due to their genetics they seem to only reproduce other furry specimens even if their partner is a human. So since their emergence in Germany they had already became 32% of Germany’s population.

1961 - America had put in place immigration laws that prevented furries from entering the U.S completely. At the time only 14000 furries were in the U.S, but the number would grow slowly since now they could only grow from reproduction and not immigration.

1991 - world population had reached 5.1 billion humans and 1.4 billion furries. At the time many of the furry population resided in Germany and Russia. Due to the strength and increased intelligence of the furry race, the Soviet Union had not fallen unlike most were predicting to happen.

1998 - With the Soviet Union still alive and well, Soviet military had reached numbers of almost a billion troops due to the combined number of humans and furries, making them the largest military in the world. America still kept their borders closed to the furries due to the second Red Scare that had happened at the time.

2000 - overall world population of furries reached 3.2 billion while humans had reached 6.5 billion.

2001 - The Soviet unions new leader, a furry wolf named Viktor Badanov, had formed an Alliance with Germany and Cuba, which all three countries had overall bigger furry populations then humans. The new alliance officially named the Red Fangs.

2005 - all humans in the Soviet Union, Germany, and Cuba were deported or executed in the event known as the 'cleansing', as the furries sought to completely take over the countries, which they successfully did.

2012 - after the alliance was formed, the U.S sat with bated breath, military leaders and government officials preparing for what they thought would be World War III. Furries in the U.S face large scale discrimination from hate groups, stating that they are 'The source
creator: Segravy
